HORIZONTAL_PUSH.notes: Can usually be performed with dumbbells, barbells or bodyweight.

HORIZONTAL_PULL.notes: Rows can be performed with dumbbells, barbells or resistance bands.

VERTICAL_PULL.notes: Usually requires a pull-up bar or lat pulldown.

SQUAT.notes: Bodyweight and goblet squat variations exist.

HINGE.notes: Can be performed using dumbbells, kettlebells or barbells.

ELBOW_FLEXION.notes: Requires only dumbbells or resistance bands.

ELBOW_EXTENSION.notes: Can be performed with bands or dumbbells.

CALF.notes: Can be trained using bodyweight or dumbbells.

ROTATION.notes: Can be performed using bands or cables.

CARRY.notes: Requires dumbbells, kettlebells or similar objects.
